text:
Created attachment 170447
patch with update to 8.7.5

Hello,

back from vacation directly the next gitlab update. Buildtests are done for 9.3, 10.0, 10.2 and 10.3 amd64 and i386. Also an update and installation was performed to test the major features of the software. 

I will write an update documentation in the future so that other persons can do the work while i'm resting in the sun ;) If you know what is needed to do it is fairly easy.

Greetings,
Torsten
